bio.Bios: Hello! My name is Uyen ("win") Sy and I initiated in my spring quarter of my freshman year. In my free time, I enjoy staying active outdoors and bullet journaling. A fun fact about myself is I have a family dog who is half German Shepherd and half Chihuahua. His name is Chase and he's a cutie! Ask me about anything you want at recruitment!
